name: @platform/contracts-auth
description: Authentication and session contract package: SessionActor schema, auth request/response shapes, and AuthError subtypes.

readme.summary: Authentication and session contract package: SessionActor schema, auth request/response shapes, and AuthError subtypes.
responsibilities: Own SessionActor Zod schema and TypeScript type for authenticated actor context
Define auth request and response shapes (LoginRequest, LogoutRequest, SessionResponse)
Export AuthErrorCode enum for auth-layer error classification
Define baseline role and permission union types (BaseRole, TenantScopedRole, GlobalRole, Permission)
nonResponsibilities: Does not import Keycloak SDK or any adapter packages
Does not own session storage or session lifecycle
Does not import domain packages or React
usage: Imported by application, platform, and adapter packages that need auth contract types
Used in API boundaries to validate and type session actor context
operationalNotes: All schemas use Zod for runtime validation
Zero @platform/* dependencies ? this is a pure contract package
